name: Launcher (E-tech)
description: Fires at the cost of 2 rockets per shot, launching a slow, drifting plasma sphere that ignores gravity. On impact it detonates, dealing elemental damage over a huge area and enveloping targets in volatile plasma, similar to other E-Tech launchers. Reloading throws the launcher as an explosive. Unlike most thrown reloads, this damage does not scale with how many rockets remain in the magazine.
notes: Drops randomly from any appropriate loot source.
